title: HSL Deputy Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Hindustan Shipyard Limited (HSL) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 3 Deputy Project Officer (Technical) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official HSL website. The last date to submit the application form is 03-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time Graduate / Diploma with not less than 55% marks in Mechanical / Electrical / Shipwright & Equivalent
qualification.details: Full time Graduate / Diploma with not less than 55% marks in Mechanical / Electrical / Shipwright & Equivalent from a recognized university / deemed university / Institute recognized by AICTE. Essential Experience (as on 03-06-2026): Minimum 02 Years post qualification experience for graduate engineers OR minimum 05 years work experience for Diploma Engineers in any one or more of the following: Operation / Repairs / Refits / Maintenance / Trials / Inspection of Naval Ships / Submarine Steel works like Fabrication, Erection, Welding on naval ships/submarine Installation & Integration of equipment / systems and overseeing / quality assurance during construction of Naval Ships / Submarines Setting to Work, Functional Trials, and Harbour Trials of engineering / electrical / Hull equipment / systems for Naval Ships / Submarine. Desirable: Retired ex-servicemen of Indian Navy (ERA, EAP & SWA-3 / equivalent & above) of ERA / EAP / SWA / MECH cadre.

salary_details.details: Rs. 75,000/- Per Month + Retention Incentive of Rs. 2,000/- on completion of every year

selection_process: Shortlisting (up to 6:1 ratio if large applications) Interview / Selection process Document verification Medical examination / fitness clearance
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HSL Deputy Project Officer (Technical) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HSL Deputy Project Officer (Technical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the HSL Deputy Project Officer (Technical) recruitment is 03-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Project Officer (Technical) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Deputy Project Officer (Technical) post in Hindustan Shipyard Limited.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Deputy Project Officer (Technical) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Full-time Graduate or Diploma with at least 55% marks in Mechanical, Electrical, or Shipwright Engineering or equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Deputy Project Officer (Technical) post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Project Officer (Technical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 75,000/- Per Month, along with a Retention Incentive of Rs. 2,000/- upon completion of each year.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 300/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee for SC/ST candidates is also Rs. 300/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the HSL Deputy Project Officer (Technical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting, interview/selection process, document verification, and medical examination/fitness clearance.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum experience required for graduate engineers?
faq.answer: Graduate engineers require a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
